title: CursorCore: Assist Programming through Aligning Anything
summary: CursorCore is a series of open-source models for AI-assisted programming that aims to replicate core features of closed-source assistants like Cursor, such as automated editing and inline chat. It introduces an Assistant-Conversation framework and aligns data generated through Programming-Instruct. The models are evaluated on the APEval benchmark and on code editing tasks using EvalPlus, CanItEdit, and OctoPack. The repository provides model weights, training scripts, and a web demo.
author: TechxGenus
